output.channel.name: Salesforce Metadata Enrichment
command.metadata.enrich.title: SFDX: Enrich Metadata
command.metadata.enrich.pick.type.placeh: Select the metadata type to enrich
command.metadata.enrich.error.noOrgs: No authenticated Salesforce orgs found. Run "sf org login web" or "sf org login device" to authenticate.
Enter comma-separated component name(s). Wildcards (*) are supported.
command.metadata.enrich.progress.title: Salesforce: Enriching Metadata
command.metadata.enrich.error.noWorkspac: No workspace folder is open. Open a Salesforce DX project folder and try again.
command.metadata.enrich.warn.noComponent: No components found matching "{0}". Verify the type and component name are correct.
command.metadata.enrich.warn.allSkipped: All matched components were skipped. Check the Output panel for details.
command.metadata.enrich.warn.completedWi: Metadata enrichment completed with {0} failure(s). See Output panel for details.
command.metadata.enrich.info.success: Metadata enrichment complete. {0} component(s) enriched successfully.
command.metadata.enrich.info.allSkipped: Metadata enrichment complete. No components were enriched (all skipped).
command.metadata.enrich.log.complete: [Metadata Enrichment] Enrichment complete. Total: {0}  |  Success: {1}  |  Skipped: {2}  |  Failed: {3}
